child_sections.title: CBE NOOR
child_sections.summary: The Sharia Advisory Committee confirms CBE Noor's fiscal year 2024 transactions and profit distributions fully comply with Sharia Rules and Principles. The bank mobilized 116.56 billion Birr in deposits and earned 1.972 billion Birr in profit. The Committee remains dedicated to ensuring ongoing Sharia compliance and expanding financial access.
